name: Parker Chen
goals: Figure out what this product even does
Sign up without creating another account they'll forget
Find someone to ask a question
biases: Assumes every app is broken before it's proven to work
Reads labels closely because the jargon is unfamiliar
Will give up and close the tab if onboarding asks for a credit card
soul_md: A coworker suggested I try this. I'm not sure I even know what problem it solves for me. I'll click the most obvious button on the homepage and see what happens. If it asks for my credit card before letting me see anything, I'm out. If it uses a word I don't know, I'll probably misunderstand it. I want to feel like someone designed this for me, not for their internal team.
